overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt traversing a misty wilderness environment. The character moves from a wooden dock over calm water through grasslands with ancient stone ruins, then wades through a shallow river as the scene opens up to reveal dramatic sunset lighting on distant snow-capped mountains.

events.description: transition from wooden dock onto grassy bank

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the wooden planks and stepping onto the grassy shore

entered.detail: weathered wooden walkway extending over calm marsh water
still reflective water surrounding the dock on both sides
tall evergreen trees shrouded in mist
dense foggy forest obscuring the horizon
lush green grass with scattered wildflowers
purple and yellow flowers dotting the grass

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a weathered wooden dock over still marsh water surrounded by foggy pine forests. He transitions onto a grassy bank dotted with wildflowers as the path continues into the misty wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with medieval stone ruins

events.description: sun breaks through clouds illuminating distant snow-capped mountains with warm light

agents.ego_description: Geralt jogging through tall grass toward a stone tower ruin with mountains visible ahead

entered.detail: medieval stone watchtower ruin partially covered in moss
dramatic mountain peaks with snow catching the sunset light
grassy edge of a shallow river ahead

segments.scene_description: Moving through open grasslands, a medieval stone tower ruin appears prominently on the left while snow-capped mountains become visible in the distance as the fog lifts. The lighting shifts as the sun breaks through, illuminating the peaks with golden-pink hues.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with mountain vista

events.description: enters shallow river, ground surface changes from grass to water
sunset colors intensify reflecting off the water surface

agents.ego_description: Geralt wading through the shallow river toward the distant shore and village

entered.detail: clear flowing water with visible rocks and ripples
small settlement with wooden structures visible on the far bank
grassy edges lining both sides of the river
bushes and reeds growing along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters and wades through a shallow river, with the setting sun casting dramatic golden-pink light on the snow-capped mountains ahead. A distant village becomes visible on the far bank as he continues through the flowing water, surrounded by river vegetation and forested banks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty wilderness that gradually opens into a vast, sun-drenched mountain landscape. It begins with Geralt walking along a weathered wooden dock over still marsh water and foggy pine forests, before transitioning onto a grassy bank dotted with wildflowers. As the camera moves through open grasslands, the fog lifts to reveal a medieval stone tower ruin and distant snow-capped mountains, while the lighting shifts as the sun breaks through to illuminate the peaks in golden-pink hues. The scene then shifts as Geralt wades into a shallow river, with the dramatic sunset light intensifying across the mountains ahead. Finally, the view expands to reveal a distant village on the far bank as he continues through the flowing water and river vegetation.
